part_name: generate the ARIA ratchet ring with correct asymmetric teeth (no fillets): outer diameter 213mm, inner diameter 120mm, thickness 21mm, 12 ratchet teeth with genuinely asymmetric profile: drive face at exactly 8 degrees from radial direction (steep face), back face at exactly 60 degrees from radial (gradual face), tooth height 8mm, tooth tip flat 3mm wide, use the 4-point tooth profile with drive_rad and back_rad to compute correct asymmetric geometry, use rotate+union loop to pattern all 12 teeth, 6x M6 bolt holes on 150mm bolt circle
